description: Lock herbal_medicine_preparation to the source-pinned Abydos herbal-wine evidence while retaining herbal knowledge and pottery as broader enabling context.

checks.reason: The node models preparation of medicinal plants, so herbal medicinal-plant knowledge is the direct prerequisite.
Pottery is retained only as a vessel/storage/heating enabler for some remedies, not as a universal hard requirement.
The node is now dated and scoped through the chemically analyzed Abydos preparation whose documented carrier is grape wine.
